phases.name: requirements
phases.prompt: Write a 'requirements.txt' for a small Flask to-do REST API. It must list Flask and Flask-SQLAlchemy (pinned to reasonable versions) and pytest for testing. Output ONLY the complete contents of requirements.txt inside a single ```text code block, nothing else.

phases.name: models
app
tests
readme

scorers.rubric: README.md documents the Flask to-do API and accurately describes the endpoints (list, create, delete) and how to install dependencies and run the server, consistent with the provided app.py.
